what: Display vault card in the global vaults list
why: Let the user see vault details and select a vault to activate the contextual sidebar. /vaults always shows ALL registered vaults — it is never filtered by an active project.

success_handling.criteria: User clicks a vault card to select it

decisions.reason: Card p-4 div is the click target; Sync/Link buttons call stopPropagation
decisions.rationale: Clicking vault info selects context; action buttons remain independent and do not trigger vault selection

decisions.reason: /vaults is always global — no project filter applied
decisions.rationale: Global vault management (/vaults) and project-linked vaults are separate concerns. Project-linked vaults are displayed as informational text in the ContextualSidebar when a project is active — they do not share the /vaults page.
